mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_export_request WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE data_export_request SET business_status=#{to},generated_export_log_id=COALESCE(#{logId},generated_export_log_id),operator_id=COALESCE(#{operator},operator_id),executed_at=CASE WHEN #{to}='COMPLETED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE executed_at END,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{id} AND business_status=#{from}

UPDATE data_export_log SET row_count=#{rowCount},file_sha256=#{fileSha256},file_size=#{fileSize},status='COMPLETED',completed_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,version=version+1 WHERE export_log_id=#{exportLogId} AND status='GENERATING'
UPDATE data_export_log SET status='FAILED',failure_reason=#{reason},completed_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,version=version+1 WHERE export_log_id=#{id} AND status='GENERATING'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_export_log WHERE export_log_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE data_export_log SET download_count=download_count+1,downloaded_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,version=version+1 WHERE export_log_id=#{id} AND status='COMPLETED' AND version=#{version}
UPDATE data_export_log SET status='EXPIRED',version=version+1 WHERE export_log_id=#{id} AND status='COMPLETED' AND version=#{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_export_log WHERE status='COMPLETED' AND completed_at<#{before}
SELECT * FROM data_export_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

choose.when: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId})
AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId})
choose.otherwise: AND (SUBSTRING(r.region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(a.applicant_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)))

choose.when: SELECT p.name,p.id_card identityNo,p.phone,p.gender,p.current_status_code status,p.current_address registeredAddress,r.region_code regionCode FROM person p LEFT JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id

SELECT h.household_no householdNo,h.address,h.region_code regionCode,h.status FROM household h WHERE 1=1 AND h.region_code=#{filters.regionCode} AND SUBSTRING(h.region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)

SELECT a.application_no applicationNo,a.business_type businessType,a.status,a.applicant_region_code regionCode,a.created_at createdAt FROM business_application a WHERE a.business_type IN('MIGRATION_IN','MIGRATION_OUT') AND a.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId} AND a.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId} AND SUBSTRING(a.applicant_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)

SELECT person_name_snapshot name,identity_no_snapshot identityNo,registered_address_snapshot registeredAddress,region_code_snapshot regionCode,archive_type archiveType,archived_at archivedAt FROM residence_archive WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSTRING(region_code_snapshot,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)

SELECT cancellation_no cancellationNo,person_name_snapshot name,identity_no_snapshot identityNo,address_snapshot registeredAddress,region_code_snapshot regionCode,business_status status FROM cancellation_record WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSTRING(region_code_snapshot,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)

SELECT f.registration_no registrationNo,p.name,p.id_card identityNo,p.phone,f.current_address registeredAddress,f.current_region_code regionCode,f.status FROM floating_population f JOIN person p ON p.person_id=f.person_id WHERE f.current_flag=1 AND SUBSTRING(f.current_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)

SELECT rp.permit_no permitNo,p.name,p.id_card identityNo,p.phone,f.current_address registeredAddress,rp.issue_region_code regionCode,rp.status,rp.valid_until validUntil FROM residence_permit rp JOIN person p ON p.person_id=rp.person_id JOIN floating_population f ON f.floating_id=rp.floating_id WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSTRING(rp.issue_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)
choose.otherwise: SELECT operation_type operationType,module_name moduleName,operation_time operationTime,operation_result operationResult FROM operation_log WHERE 1=1 AND user_id=#{scope.userId}
